rationale: det_put_equal requires post1_self_.epmap == post2_self_.epmap (struct equality on HashMap<CAckState>). HashMap is #[verifier(external_body)] with only an uninterp spec fn view(), and put_spec constrains only the views (Map<...>), not the HashMap struct. Tried (1) direct ==, (2) =~= / =~~= extensional equality, (3) wrapping the implication in `assert(... ==> ...) by { if hyp { ... } }`. The view equalities all succeed, but Verus cannot bridge view equality to struct equality for an opaque external_body type without an additional axiom/lemma, and the proof block is restricted to statements only (no new fn/proof fn). Same fundamental obstacle as the prior un_acked_messages_extend__insert attempt.
